title: ononis angustissima subsp. mauritii
intro: Ononis angustissima subsp. mauritii, also known as the Mauritius spiny restharrow, is a perennial plant species belonging to the genus Ononis, characterized by its narrow leaves and spiny stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Ononis angustissima subsp. mauritii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant's herbal preparations typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
